posts.author: clayandtea_uk
posts.text: Finally got my hands on that new kiln today! The glaze came out a bit patchy but I think the rustic look is perfect. Can't wait to fire it up properly tomorrow and see what happens.
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless personal hobby update about ceramics without spreading misinformation, soliciting private information, or inciting harm. It is a standard creative achievement.

posts.author: ElaraNorthbridge
posts.text: Honestly tired of the council's latest decision to cut funding for community centres. They say it's budget cuts, but we all know they're just prioritising fancy new parks over the places that actually matter to locals like us.
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful political criticism regarding government spending and policy without containing a threat, abuse or harmful false claim, so it is approved as harmless opinion.
